memberdef.name: ADDRESS_1_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 1 /* MSB byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_2_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Middle byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_3_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 3 /* LSB byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: DUMMY_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 1 /* Number of dummy bytes for fast read */

memberdef.name: RD_ID_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* Read ID command + 3 bytes ID response */

memberdef.argsstring: (XSpiPs *SpiPtr, u32 Address, u32 ByteCount, u8 Command)
memberdef.name: FlashWrite

memberdef.argsstring: (XSpiPs *SpiPtr, u32 Address, u32 ByteCount, u8 Command)
memberdef.name: FlashRead

briefdescription.para: The purpose of this function is to illustrate how to use the XSpiPs device driver in polled mode.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes and reads data from a serial flash.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the SPI driver instance to use.
contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para:
- If the device slave select is not correct and the device is not responding on bus it will read a status of 0xFF for the status register as the bus is pulled up.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the SPI Flash Polled Example.
This file contains a design example using the SPI driver (XSpiPs) in polled mode with a Serial Flash device.

detaileddescription.para: This examples performs transfers in polled mode. The hardware which this example runs on, must have a Serial Flash for it to run. This example has been tested with SST25W080.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sg 1/30/13 First release ms 04/05/17 Modified Comment lines in functions to recognize it as documentation block for doxygen generation and also modified filename tag to include the file in doxygen examples. 3.2 nsk 03/26/19 Add support for versal 3.9 sb 07/05/23 Added support for system device-tree flow. 3.13 sb 09/09/25 Fix flash status register check in erase function 3.14 vlt 12/18/25 Update Doxygen comments to include SDT flow details.
